report_date_basis: Cowork dashboard report date follows receipt/publication date; underlying business data represents the prior day.
source: Public ESPN RSS + Yahoo Sports RSS feeds
warnings: Backfill snapshots are best-effort from currently available RSS items; RSS feeds may not retain all items from the original report date.

source_detail.yahoo_news_sports: excluded for v0.2 because quick validation showed lower relevance and higher safety/noise risk than Yahoo Sports RSS.

items.headline: Sources: U-M regents to meet, mull AD Manuel fate
items.detail: The University of Michigan regents are expected to discuss an investigation into the culture of its athletic department on Thursday, sources told ESPN, and as part of the review, a decision on the future of AD Warde Manuel is expected in the coming days.

items.headline: Mid-Major Madness Reacts Survey: Is Wichita the right choice to join Dayton?
items.detail: Welcome to SB Nation Reacts, a survey of fans across the NCAA. Throughout the year we ask questions of the most plugged-in Mid-Major fans and fans across the country. Sign up here to participate in the weekly emailed surveys. Dayton, Ohio, you have company. The NCAA selection committee announced last week that the newly expanded […]

items.headline: I Agree With Lunardi: Oklahoma State Looks Like an NCAA Tournament Team
items.detail: ESPN s way-too-early Bracketology has Oklahoma State as the last team into the expanded 76-team NCAA Tournament, and I think that s a fair projection. Steve Lutz has quickly changed expectations in Stillwater, and I believe the Cowboys belong in the March Madness conversation.
